framework.name: Three-Mode Agent OAuth (OBO User/Self/Agent)
framework.description: Yao's draft defines three distinct operational modes for agent auth: agent on-behalf-of user, agent on-behalf-of itself (autonomous), and agent on-behalf-of other agents. Each gets its own OAuth workflow extension. This is the most explicit attempt to solve multi-hop delegation within OAuth rather than inventing new crypto.
framework.raw_quote: AI agents may work On-behalf-of(OBO) users, itself, or other AI agents. In different cases, there are different requirements on the authentication and authorization, leading to different workflows.

source.title: Further considerations on AI Agent Authentication and Authorization ...
